title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.130 - Breach of trust — proceedings
text:
71.130.  Breach of trust — proceedings. — Such proceedings shall be conducted as near as may be in conformity with the law regulating practice in civil cases.
(RSMo 1939 § 7315) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7164; 1919 § 8613; 1909 § 9501
